name: honeypot
description: LLM honeypot with sequential attack detection using LSTM

scripts.setup:py: python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.trigger:detect: node scripts/trigger_lstm.js --count 24 --mode attack && npm run detect && tail -n 10 logs/alerts.jsonl
scripts.calibrate:runtime: ./.venv/bin/python scripts/calibrate_runtime_threshold.py --dataset data/sequences_large.npz --model models/lstm_detector_large.pt --novelty-model models/novelty_autoencoder_large.pt --meta models/model_meta_large.json --scaler models/scaler_large.json --runtime-novelty-mode recompute --runtime-novelty-quantile 0.995 --runtime-novelty-margin 1.0
scripts.calibrate:runtime:large: ./.venv/bin/python scripts/calibrate_runtime_threshold.py --dataset data/sequences_large.npz --model models/lstm_detector_large.pt --novelty-model models/novelty_autoencoder_large.pt --meta models/model_meta_large.json --scaler models/scaler_large.json --runtime-novelty-mode recompute --runtime-novelty-quantile 0.995 --runtime-novelty-margin 1.0
scripts.compare:fusion:holdout: ./.venv/bin/python scripts/compare_fusion_holdout.py --dataset data/sequences_large.npz --model models/lstm_detector_large.pt --novelty-model models/novelty_autoencoder_large.pt --meta models/model_meta_large.json --output models/fusion_holdout_report_large.json
scripts.compare:fusion:holdout:tuned: ./.venv/bin/python scripts/compare_fusion_holdout.py --dataset data/sequences_large.npz --model models/lstm_detector_large.pt --novelty-model models/novelty_autoencoder_large.pt --meta models/model_meta_large.json --output models/fusion_holdout_report_large.json --tune-blend-threshold --max-benign-fpr 0.03
scripts.pipeline: npm run preprocess && npm run train && npm run train:novelty && npm run detect
scripts.pipeline:group10: npm run preprocess && npm run train && npm run train:novelty && npm run validate:group10
scripts.pipeline:large: npm run preprocess:large && npm run train:large && npm run train:novelty:large && npm run validate:group10:large
scripts.report:refresh: npm run reset:runtime-state && npm run calibrate:runtime && npm run validate && npm run compare:fusion:holdout:tuned && bash scripts/task_runner.sh trigger --count 25 --mode adaptive && npm run detect && npm run gate:session
scripts.report:refresh:large: npm run reset:runtime-state && npm run calibrate:runtime:large && npm run validate:large
